chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDHY, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-1262 of 2012 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.11.2016. Eor hearins of M. A. No.6375/2014. None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Akbar Kalhoro, State Counsel, alongwith Dr. Naseer Ahmed, Focal Person of District Health Officer, Dadu. Vide order dated 08.5.2014 this petition was disposed of on the undertaking of District Health Ofhcer that the case of the petitioner would be considered according to the existing rules within three months, who had sought his appointment in Health Department on deceased quota. Since the compliance was not made, the listed contempt application was fi1ed. Today, Dr. Naseer Ahmed, Focal Person on behalf of District Health Officer, Dadu, is present and submits that as the ban is imposed upon appointments by the Govt. of Sindh, therefore, the case of the petitioner could not be considered. We are afraid, the contention of said Focal Person is not correct in view of Notihcation issued by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, bearing No.SO(C.IV)SGA&CD/4-17l16, dated 13h July, 2016, whereby a Committee has been constituted to scrutinize and decide the cases of appointments against deceased quota from BS-1 to BS-7 as per law/ rules/ policy with the composition of 1. Chief Secretary, Sindh (Chairman), 2. Secretary, Law Department (Member), and 3. Secretary, concerned department (Member). The said notification was subsequently modified by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, vide Notihcation No.SO(C- L IV)SGA&CD/4 -17 I 16, dated 16t August, 2016, for the posts from BPS- 1 to BPS-11 instead of posts from BPS-1 to BPS-7, as per law/rules and recruitme nt policy.

Secretary, concerned department (Member). The said notification was subsequently modified by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, vide Notihcation No.SO(C- L IV)SGA&CD/4 -17 I 16, dated 16t August, 2016, for the posts from BPS- 1 to BPS-11 instead of posts from BPS-1 to BPS-7, as per law/rules and recruitme nt policy. We, therefore, direct the respondent No. 1 to consider the case of the petitioner for his appointment against deceased quota within a period of two months hereof in accordance with law and submit compliance report to this Court through Additional Registrar. Copy of this order be communicated to Chief Secretary, Govt. of Sindh, Secretary, Govt. of Sindh, Health Secretary, Govt. of Sindh, Law Department, for compliance. Department and information and The iisted application stands disposed of in above terms JUDGE JUDGE f
